links.key: bird-栗耳阿拉卡鴷-049da1b9__distributed_in__loc-米西奧內斯省-阿根廷-0a2ee9b9
links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: australis is found from south of the Amazon in north central Brazil south through northern Bolivia, eastern Paraguay, and northeastern Argentina's Misiones Province into southeastern Brazil to Minas Gerais, São Paulo state, and Rio Grande do Sul. The chestnut-eared aracari is found in a wide variety of landscapes, many of which are characterized by standing or flowing water
